prompt: Subject is the exact woman from the reference image with 100% identity fidelity, preserving her precise bone structure, eye spacing, and jawline. She wears a premium, custom-tailored white silk Ao Dai with a high collar and a subtle gold-threaded lotus embroidery on the right shoulder, paired with deep red silk trousers that ripple in the breeze. The background features the iconic brutalist architecture of the Palace with vintage T-54 tanks visible in the distance. Lighting is cinematic golden hour, casting long, soft shadows and creating a warm glow on her skin. Shot with a Sony A7R V, 35mm f/1.8 G Master lens, eye-level candid perspective, sharp focus on her pupils with a gentle cinematic depth of field.
